subject: [PATCH v7 20/20] nfsd: add support to CB_NOTIFY for dir attribute changes

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds support to the NFS server (nfsd) to send directory attribute change notifications to clients using the CB_NOTIFY operation. When a client requests dir attribute change notifications, the server will send these notifications alongside other events such as add, remove, and rename operations. The server still recalls the delegation on a SETATTR operation, so these notifications are only sent for changes to child directories. The patch modifies several files in the nfsd codebase to implement this new functionality.
